mapper.select: select preview_masking_enabled, error_line_masking_enabled, log_masking_enabled, content_encryption_enabled, encryption_key_ref, download_requires_approval, masking_rule_set from batch.file_template_config where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and template_code = #{templateCode} and enabled = true and is_deleted = false order by version desc limit 1
select * from batch.file_template_config where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = false limit 1
mapper.update: update batch.file_template_config set enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = false
update batch.file_template_config set is_deleted = true, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = false
mapper.insert: insert into batch.file_template_config ( tenant_id, template_code, template_name, template_type, biz_type, file_format_type, charset, target_charset, with_bom, line_separator, delimiter, quote_char, escape_char, record_length, header_rows, footer_rows, header_template, trailer_template, checksum_type, compress_type, encrypt_type, naming_rule, field_mappings, validation_rule_set, default_query_code, default_query_sql, query_param_schema, streaming_enabled, page_size, fetch_size, chunk_size, preview_masking_enabled, error_line_masking_enabled, log_masking_enabled, content_encryption_enabled, encryption_key_ref, download_requires_approval, masking_rule_set, enabled, version, description, load_target_ref, export_data_ref, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{p.tenantId}, #{p.templateCode}, #{p.basicInfo.templateName}, #{p.basicInfo.templateType}, #{p.basicInfo.bizType}, #{p.format.fileFormatType}, #{p.format.charset}, #{p.format.targetCharset}, #{p.format.withBom}, #{p.format.lineSeparator}, #{p.format.delimiter}, #{p.format.quoteChar}, #{p.format.escapeChar}, #{p.format.recordLength}, #{p.format.headerRows}, #{p.format.footerRows}, #{p.format.headerTemplateJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{p.format.trailerTemplateJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{p.format.checksumType}, #{p.format.compressType}, #{p.format.encryptType}, #{p.format.namingRule}, #{p.format.fieldMappingsJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{p.format.validationRuleSetJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{p.query.defaultQueryCode}, #{p.query.defaultQuerySql}, #{p.query.queryParamSchemaJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{p.runtime.streamingEnabled}, #{p.runtime.pageSize}, #{p.runtime.fetchSize}, #{p.runtime.chunkSize}, #{p.security.previewMaskingEnabled}, #{p.security.errorLineMaskingEnabled}, #{p.security.logMaskingEnabled}, #{p.security.contentEncryptionEnabled}, #{p.security.encryptionKeyRef}, #{p.security.downloadRequiresApproval}, #{p.security.maskingRuleSet}, #{p.basicInfo.enabled}, #{p.basicInfo.version}, #{p.basicInfo.description}, #{p.pluginRefs.loadTargetRef}, #{p.pluginRefs.exportDataRef}, #{p.audit.createdBy}, #{p.audit.updatedBy}, current_timestamp, current_timestamp ) on conflict (tenant_id, template_code, version) do update set template_name = excluded.template_name, template_type = excluded.template_type, biz_type = excluded.biz_type, file_format_type = excluded.file_format_type, charset = excluded.charset, target_charset = excluded.target_charset, with_bom = excluded.with_bom, line_separator = excluded.line_separator, delimiter = excluded.delimiter, quote_char = excluded.quote_char, escape_char = excluded.escape_char, record_length = excluded.record_length, header_rows = excluded.header_rows, footer_rows = excluded.footer_rows, header_template = excluded.header_template, trailer_template = excluded.trailer_template, checksum_type = excluded.checksum_type, compress_type = excluded.compress_type, encrypt_type = excluded.encrypt_type, naming_rule = excluded.naming_rule, field_mappings = excluded.field_mappings, validation_rule_set = excluded.validation_rule_set, default_query_code = excluded.default_query_code, default_query_sql = excluded.default_query_sql, query_param_schema = excluded.query_param_schema, streaming_enabled = excluded.streaming_enabled, page_size = excluded.page_size, fetch_size = excluded.fetch_size, chunk_size = excluded.chunk_size, preview_masking_enabled = excluded.preview_masking_enabled, error_line_masking_enabled = excluded.error_line_masking_enabled, log_masking_enabled = excluded.log_masking_enabled, content_encryption_enabled = excluded.content_encryption_enabled, encryption_key_ref = excluded.encryption_key_ref, download_requires_approval = excluded.download_requires_approval, masking_rule_set = excluded.masking_rule_set, load_target_ref = excluded.load_target_ref, export_data_ref = excluded.export_data_ref, enabled = excluded.enabled, description = excluded.description, updated_by = excluded.updated_by, is_deleted = false, updated_at = current_timestamp
mapper.select: select template_code, template_type, enabled, default_query_sql, field_mappings, naming_rule from batch.file_template_config where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and is_deleted = false
